```yaml
alias: Sunset Light Control
mode: single
trigger:
  - platform: time
    at: '18:00:00'  # Adjust this time based on your sunset time
action:
  - service: light.turn_on
    target:
      entity_id: light.living_room
  - service: light.turn_on
    target:
      entity_id: light.kitchen
  - service: light.turn_off
    target:
      entity_id: light.living_room
  - service: light.turn_off
    target:
      entity_id: light.kitchen
  -platform: time
    at: '23:30:00'
action:
  - service: light.turn_off
    target:
      entity_id: light.living_room
  - service: light.turn_off
    target:
      entity_id: light.kitchen
```

```yaml
alias: Temperature Control for Living Room
mode: single
trigger:
  - platform: state
    entity_id: sensor.temperature_living_room
    from: '24'
    to: '18'
action:
  - service: climate.hvac_main.set_mode
    target:
      entity_id: climate.hvac_main
      state: 'on'
      mode: 'heat'
  - service: climate.hvac_main.set_mode
    target:
      entity_id: climate.hvac_main
      state: 'on'
      mode: 'cool'
```

```yaml
alias: Motion with Door Open Alert
mode: single
trigger:
  - platform: state
    entity_id: sensor.motion_hallway
    state: 'on'
  - platform: state
    entity_id: sensor.door_front
    state: 'open'
action:
  - service: notify.mobile_app
    data:
      title: 'Motion detected with door open'
      message: 'Motion detected with door open'
```

```yaml
alias: "Bedroom Heater Activation"
mode: single
trigger:
  - platform: time
    at: '07:00'
    interval: 1weekdays
action:
  - service: climate.hvac_main.turn_on
  - service: switch.heater_bedroom.turn_on
  - service: light.bedroom.turn_on
  - service: climate.hvac_main.set_temperature
    data:
      temperature: 22
  - delay: 1800
    service: switch.heater_bedroom.turn_off
    condition: 
      - condition: state
        entity_id: sensor.humidity_bedroom
        state: 'below'
        value: '40'
    entity_id: switch.heater_bedroom
```
